summary: Comprehensive testing of JaipurEyeVision Studio MVP completed successfully. All backend API endpoints working correctly, frontend loads properly with full navigation functionality, admin login works, and all required features are accessible.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with login/signup forms
Admin login with provided credentials (admin@jaipureyevision.com / admin@3036)
Dashboard displays 10000 credits and Active subscription status
All sidebar navigation links work (11/11 pages accessible)
Admin panel visible and accessible for admin users
Content generation page loads with proper form elements
Code generation page loads with action tabs (Write, Debug, Explain, Refactor, Unit Tests)
Billing page shows 6 subscription plans as required
Backend API security working (401 responses for unauthorized requests)
User signup and login flow working
Credits balance and user profile endpoints working
Admin endpoints working (users, usage logs, error logs)
